name: HiMe: Real-Time Self-Hosted Personal Agent Platform for Health Insights with Wearable Devices

description: arXiv:2607.21019v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Traditional approaches to wearable health signal analysis, such as smartwatches, are constrained by rigid analytical frameworks and limited personalisation. author: Wei Liu, Siya Qi, Linhai Zhang, Lorainne Tudor Car, Yulan He
